case_title: ANDRESEN, ROBERT vs. LEONI, SAMUEL ALFRED ALEX et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRESEN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT LEONI, SAMUEL ALFRED ALEX
